title: Mary Cook
compiled_truth: Mary Cook is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-14), Mary Cook sent 423 and received 1997 emails, totalling 2420 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (203), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (156), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (107), [Marie Heard](people/marie-heard) (79), [Brent Hendry](people/brent-hendry) (75). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, archive, deleted_items, elizabeth_sager, inbox, kcs.
